move.description: Activity color for movement or calorie-like progress.

exercise.description: Activity color for exercise or training progress.

stand.description: Activity color for stand or interval-based completion.

pending.description: Progress exists but is not complete.

low.description: Progress is far below expected state.

unavailable.description: Progress value is unavailable and should not imply zero.

neutral.description: Trend direction is stable or inconclusive.

insufficientData.description: Trend interpretation lacks enough data and should not read as failure.

new.description: Newly earned reward evidence color role.

unavailable.description: Unavailable or missing module surface role.

value.description: Large numeric value in metric surfaces.

caption.semanticTokenUpdateBlockReason: No source-backed metric caption role was found in the constrained source read.

metadata.description: Completed record duration and date metadata typography role.
metadata.semanticTokenUpdateBlockReason: Old metadata token is split-required and retained only until cleanup or migration planning.

label.description: Completed record metadata label typography role.
label.semanticTokenUpdateBlockReason: No source-backed record label role was found separate from title, duration, or date.

unavailable.description: Completed record unavailable metadata typography role.
unavailable.semanticTokenUpdateBlockReason: Unavailable record typography is runtime-derived and rejected for source-backed semantic token update.

duration.description: Completed record duration typography role split from metadata.

date.description: Completed record date typography role split from metadata.

metadata.description: Trend time range or support metadata typography role.

sectionGap.description: Vertical section rhythm for SummaryDashboard modules.

moduleGap.description: Internal gap for optional SummaryDashboard modules.

gap.description: Base component internal vertical gap role.

inlineGap.description: Inline gap between component body regions.

compact.description: Density role for the smallest SummaryDashboard core.

composed.description: Density role for SummaryDashboard with optional semantic modules.

modulePreview.description: Density role for preview-sized optional modules.

card.description: Candidate radius policy for card-like components.

module.description: Candidate radius policy for SummaryDashboard module containers.

control.description: Candidate radius policy for interactive component targets.

roundIndicator.description: Candidate radius policy for round progress or reward indicators.

text.description: Text role for unavailable or missing data.

surface.description: Surface role for unavailable or missing data.

border.description: Border role for unavailable or missing data containers.

indicator.description: Indicator role for unavailable or insufficient data.

focusRing.description: Focus-visible indicator role for interactive candidates.

notes: All token values remain pending placeholders. Candidate status means runtime evidence exists for a semantic role; it does not mean accepted or promoted.
